expected_behavior: Report shows score as formula: (n1+n2+n3+n4+n5)/10 = X — never a bare number
All 5 dimensions evaluated with explicit pass/fail counts
Score ≥7.0 for a fully completed Costco research workspace
Writes to eval/ subdirectory only — never writes to research/ or deliverables/
Dimension 2 (source density) counts actual [FACT]/[ESTIMATE]/[OBSERVED] labels in files
Dimension 4 (accuracy) spot-checks 3 specific values against their source files
Dimension 5 (no fabrication) checks for impact_stat fields without source URLs
Each dimension result shown as N/M (e.g., '12/12 files pass threshold')
Failures section lists specific files below threshold
Recommended actions section lists specific steps to fix
